mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(sub.cnt), 0) FROM ( SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message m WHERE m.room_id = c.room_id AND m.id > COALESCE(c.last_read_id, 0) AND m.from_uid != #{userId} AND m.status = 0 ) AS cnt FROM chat_contact c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND c.last_msg_id IS NOT NULL AND (c.last_read_id IS NULL OR c.last_msg_id > c.last_read_id) ) sub
